archetype.name: Beastmaster
archetype.note: This archetype offers Initiate Warden at a different level than displayed here.

feat.name: Initiate Warden
feat.special: You can take this feat multiple times, choosing a different initial warden spell each time.
feat.text: You’ve trained with one of the ranger sects known as wardens, who practice a specialized type of primal magic. You gain your choice of one warden spell from the initial *warden spells* (or another you have access to).

traits.name: Ranger
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the ranger class.

sections.name: Archetype Use
sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.
